ITP / New York University

Queena
Zheng

Where stillness meets movement

Scroll

Chapter I

The architecture
of silence

The world isn't smooth—it's a collection of angles, facets, and light. We embrace the sharp edges of creativity to craft experiences that feel tangible in a virtual world. Here, simplicity is the ultimate sophistication, and every polygon tells a story of intent.

Chapter II

Draped in
liquid light

There is a profound power in the unadorned. We believe in the strength of the original form—the raw, geometric soul of things. By focusing on the essential, we create a space where light and shadow perform a dance of pure clarity.

Elegance is not about being noticed. It is about being remembered.

Chapter III

Colour of
warm stone

As you scroll, the horizon shifts. What was once a flat plane rises into a jagged peak; what was once a shadow becomes a highlight. In this 3D realm, you are not just an observer—you are the catalyst for transformation. Feel the rhythm of the geometry as it breathes and bends to your curiosity.

The Collection

Defining
edges in a
fluid world

Observe the seamless flow of evolution. As you descend, the environment adapts, echoing the fluid nature of modern ideas. This is a landscape where the digital feels organic, and the abstract feels real. We define the boundaries so you can break them.

Connect with the Core
Properties ▼
